## Testing

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] docs updated if needed
- [ ] shell syntax checked if installer or release scripts changed

## Scope Check

- [ ] this change does not expand the project into browser automation, auto-login, vault mutation, or generic secret management
- [ ] this change does not log or persist secret values
- [ ] stdout and stderr behavior remains intentional for machine-readable commands
